description: Informal note. In Judaeo-Arabic. The writer expresses his regret at the addressee's departure, and his distress at what the addressee will soon learn from ʿAfīf al-Dīn. The language is somewhat confusing but may refer to a secretary (kātib) working against the interests of the addressee (al-ʿāmil ʿalayka). The writer urges the addressee not to ignore his legal rights in this matter. Al-Shaykh al-Muwaffaq has also written to the addressee about this. ASE.
